name: timetracker-by-andrei
description: Track active coding time, project costs, goals and AI usage

commands.title: VSCode Tracker: Add Note to Last Session

vscodeTracker.language.description: Dashboard language. 'auto' follows the VS Code UI language.

vscodeTracker.idleThresholdSeconds.description: Seconds of inactivity before session ends (also used as a heuristic for break detection)

vscodeTracker.unfocusedGraceSeconds.description: Seconds the window can stay unfocused (watching an AI run, reading docs/browser) before the session ends. Higher = fewer fragmented sessions.

vscodeTracker.defaultHourlyRate.description: Default hourly rate in selected currency (0 = disabled)

vscodeTracker.dailyGoalHours.description: Global daily coding goal in hours (0 = no goal). All projects count toward this.

vscodeTracker.weeklyGoalHours.description: Global weekly coding goal in hours (0 = no goal). All projects count toward this.

vscodeTracker.pomodoroWorkMinutes.description: Pomodoro work phase duration in minutes

vscodeTracker.pomodoroBreakMinutes.description: Pomodoro break phase duration in minutes

vscodeTracker.breakReminderHours.description: Show break reminder after N continuous hours of coding (0 = disabled)

vscodeTracker.promptForNotes.description: Auto-prompt for notes/tags when a session ends manually

vscodeTracker.enableAITracking.description: Parse Claude Code logs to show AI cost and token usage

vscodeTracker.aiCustomModels.description: Custom AI model pricing definitions for non-Claude models

input_per_mtok.description: Cost per million input tokens in USD

output_per_mtok.description: Cost per million output tokens in USD

color.description: Hex color for this model in charts (e.g. '#10a37f')

vscodeTracker.aiExtraLogDirs.description: Directorios extra a escanear en busca de logs JSONL de uso de IA (tokens/coste).

vscodeTracker.codexSessionsDir.description: Ruta a la carpeta de sesiones de Codex CLI. Vacio = ~/.codex/sessions.

vscodeTracker.enableAIActivityTracking.description: Registrar TIEMPO de uso de asistentes IA (Copilot, Codex, opencode) por actividad de ficheros.

vscodeTracker.aiActivityPollSeconds.description: Intervalo de sondeo (segundos) para detectar actividad de asistentes IA.

vscodeTracker.aiActivityIdleGapSeconds.description: Hueco maximo (segundos) entre actividades para contarlo como tiempo continuo.

vscodeTracker.aiActivityToolPaths.description: Override de rutas por herramienta, p.ej. { "copilot": ["C:/..."], "opencode": ["..."] }.

scripts.release: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run compile && vsce package
